arts.ttl: Athletic Club dealt injury blow ahead of Man United tie
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Athletic Club have on Wednesday been dealt a concerning blow on the personnel front. This comes after star midfielder Oihan Sancet was forced into a premature departure…

arts.ttl: Nico Williams still ‘undecided’ on Premier League transfer
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao winger Nico Williams is still undecided about leaving the club this summer, amid strong interest from the Premier League. Williams was a transfer target for leadings clubs last summer after starring during Spain’s successful Euro 2024 campaign. Barcelona were heavily linked, though Williams turned down a transfer in favour of remaining at the […] The post Nico Williams still ‘undecided’ on Premier League transfer first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive Nico Williams update as Chelsea prepare €50m offer
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly preparing a €50 million offer for Como winger Assane Diao in a deal that could boost Arsenal ’s chances of landing Nico Williams . The Spanish outlet claims that Chelsea view Diao as a “promising prospect” and they are reportedly expected to intensify their pursuit ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window as they continue to search for the best young talents in world football.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams injury update before Athletic Club vs Las Palmas
arts.sum: Athletic Club have on Tuesday been afforded some altogether positive news on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that Nico Williams has been cleared for competitive action once more.…

arts.ttl: Nico Williams TORN over Arsenal summer transfer
arts.sum: Nico Williams is torn over whether to join Arsenal or stay at Athletic Bilbao this summer. Arsenal and Barcelona were in a two-way tussle to sign Williams last summer but the player eventually stayed at Athletic Bilbao.

arts.ttl: Athletic Bilbao injury latest for Man United Europa League clash after Nico Williams update
arts.sum: Latest injury news from the opposition camp as Manchester United soon face Athletic Club in the Europa League semi-finals

arts.ttl: Athletic Club star hails Real Madrid player for moment of ‘genius’ during La Liga clash
arts.sum: Athletic Club star Unai Nuñez has moved to reveal his appreciation for the efforts of Real Madrid midfielder Federico Valverde. This of course comes after the Uruguayan international proved himself…
